description: An abstract mixed-media work dominated by a heavily textured white and gray surface with embedded patterns, raised forms, and layered materials. Patches of turquoise appear at the lower left and in scattered areas, while muted coral, rust, and ochre tones emerge in various spots across the surface. The texture is rich and varied, suggesting built-up layers of paint, plaster, or other materials. Faint impressions of organic or ornamental patterns are visible in the surface relief. The overall effect is of an aged, weathered surface with subtle color emerging from predominantly neutral tones.

_meta.title: Since the coherence left the judgment (2017)
